updates.title: Bookworm moved the Raspberry Pi boot partition to /boot/firmware — edits to /boot/config.txt are silently ignored
Boot a Raspberry Pi 5 from NVMe — BOOT_ORDER=0xf416, PCIE_PROBE=1 for non-HAT+ adapters, PCIe gen 3 at your own risk
Decode vcgencmd get_throttled on Raspberry Pi — under-voltage bits, 0x50005, and the Pi 5 5A PSU / USB current limit
Enable secure boot on Jetson Orin — PKC/SBK fuse burning with odmfuse.sh: dry-run first, fuses are write-once
Encrypt the Jetson rootfs with LUKS — ROOTFS_ENC=1 flashing, EKB-derived per-device keys, and the unencrypted /boot split
Flash the Jetson AGX Thor devkit — unified initrd flashing only (l4t_initrd_flash.sh + apply_binaries.sh --openrm)
Headless Raspberry Pi provisioning on Bookworm — ssh file + userconf.txt (no default pi user), Imager OS customisation
Image-based OTA on fused Jetsons — build the payload with the same PKC/SBK keys the device was fused with
JetPack 7 aligns Jetson with SBSA — one CUDA 13 Arm toolkit for Thor and Arm servers, but Orin (sm_87) stays on the old path
JetPack 7.x support matrix — 7.0/7.1 are Thor-only (L4T 38.x), Orin joins at JetPack 7.2 (L4T 39.2)
